# Estate Agent Newsletters

> Estate Agent Newsletters is a done-for-you, weekly local email newsletter service for UK estate agents. It helps an agency become the go-to, most-recognised name in its area and win more instructions from sellers and landlords. Each newsletter is exclusive to a single agency per area.

Every Thursday morning we send an agency's professionally written newsletter, in the agency's own branding. Each edition features the latest local events and businesses, a local property market update, and the agency's Property of the Week. It is genuinely useful local content that homeowners look forward to opening.

The service is completely hands-off and goes live within 48 hours. We manage everything — the writing and the sending — while the agency owns the audience. We build and grow the subscriber list from scratch with targeted local advertising, and can also invite an agency's existing database of past clients and enquiries to subscribe.

The purpose is trust and visibility: sellers and landlords do not choose an agent at random, they choose the one they trust, recognise and see as the local expert. Turning up every week with valuable local content keeps the agency in front of homeowners all year round.

## Pricing

- £349 per month, which includes £100 per month of ad spend used to reach new local subscribers.
- One newsletter per area, exclusive to the subscribing agency for as long as they subscribe. When an agency stops, the area becomes available again.

## Get started

- Free sample: an agent can request a free sample newsletter to see what theirs would look like.
- Contact: hello@estateagentnewsletters.co.uk

## Links

- [Home](https://estateagentnewsletters.co.uk/): Main landing page explaining the offering.
